title: Off topic eva pictures aka Funny Eva
display_title: Off topic eva pictures aka Funny Eva
wikitext:
[]: Off topic eva pictures aka Funny Eva             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Feb 13, 2006 7:13 pm The reason that I put this here is that people will be able to go more off topic with their discussion of the pictures than in the other fourms Anyways I will get the ball rolling

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Feb 13, 2006 11:27 pm Some you've seen, some you may not have seen....just for the hell of it

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Feb 13, 2006 11:32 pm And here's some smaller avater size crap I dug up.... And I have no idea what's goin on in this picture....I didn't know Gendo smoked.... And a personal favorite NGE pic of mine... Apperntly some of the members of the commitee smoke as well....

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Feb 14, 2006 12:54 am in your second to last picture, they're having a strike or something

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 14, 2006 4:17 am There's a steady stream of humorously captioned NGE pics on the ShoujoAi captioned pictures forum, too many threads to cite here http://www.shoujoai.com/forum/board_show.pl?bid=10 Usually they are labelled [EVA] but some aren't, like http://www.shoujoai.com/forum/topic_show.pl?tid=33687 http://www.shoujoai.com/forum/topic_show.pl?tid=33581

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 14, 2006 10:13 am IMPORTANT As with any picture thread, please use an image shack, photobucket, or personal web space. DO NOT hot link images out of courtesy to others.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Feb 14, 2006 10:31 am sachiel ftw! random images: [url]http://i18.photobucket.com/albums/b137/darth_mark/evangelion/shogouki_ignore.jpg[/url] [url]http://i18.photobucket.com/albums/b137/darth_mark/evangelion/shinji_emo.jpg[/url] [url]http://i18.photobucket.com/albums/b137/darth_mark/evangelion/matroska.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 14, 2006 10:55 am A whole bunch of 4-koma in Chinese scanlation , most of which I'd not seen before http://rapidshare.de/files/13248911/4koma_Second_Impact.zip.html indeed the only one I'd seen was this

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Tue Feb 14, 2006 11:04 am O love that...

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Feb 14, 2006 11:36 am What the hell?! Is the right hand side some wacky form of Maya's instrumentality? Dude, do not become one with those guys...if that's what they're asking her....I hope for her sake not....of course Keel would ask her to merge data with him....

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Feb 14, 2006 1:56 pm Titus wrote: O love that...

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Feb 14, 2006 2:31 pm I don't know what's up with this one, but I like it.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Wed Feb 15, 2006 10:23 am GENDOWNED!

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Wed Feb 15, 2006 11:18 am OMG, thats the best! Ill post something better if you can tell me which movie the 2nd one was from... >The 1st was Saving Ryan's Privates......

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Wed Feb 15, 2006 11:48 am The thin red line? and its shaving ryan's privates by the way

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Wed Feb 15, 2006 12:37 pm they're both from er.. shaving ryan's privates.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 15, 2006 2:28 pm

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Wed Feb 15, 2006 3:03 pm zomg i love the expression on his face.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Wed Feb 15, 2006 3:15 pm It's the, I'm not gonna get laid tonite but drunk and desperate enough to try look....
